title: 2.5L CROWN Easy Clean MATT Emulsion Multi Surface Paint That can be Used on Walls, Ceilings, Wood and Metal. Stain & Scrub Resistant Formula – Soft Linen
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
description: Crown Easyclean's emulsion is specially formulated to allow for repeated cleaning and is 200 times harder and more washable than our standard matt finish. Easyclean has been independently tested and proven to have the best stain and scrub resistance, toughness and washability. Easyclean keeps walls, ceilings, wood and metal cleaner for longer, making it perfect for busy family homes
